
## Copilot Instructions for Demand Forecasting Project

- [ ] Clarify Project Requirements
- [ ] Scaffold the Project
- [ ] Customize the Project
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

### Guidelines
- Use the current directory as the project root.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Only install extensions if specified in requirements.
- Do not create new folders unless explicitly requested.
- Ensure README.md and requirements.txt are up to date.

---
This checklist helps track progress and maintain best practices for the Demand Forecasting for E-Commerce machine learning project.
